titles.title: I Am Complete In the Lord

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am strong in the Lord I am strong in the Lord The Lord is all source of my strength Everyday giving me power, power to walk in His might I am complete in the Lord Amen.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I am what God says I am New creature in the Lord Old thing shave passed away Praise the Lord New things have put them on, Holy nation of the Lord I am complete in the Lord Amen.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So I am singing hero of the Lord That am blessed with spiritual blessings So I am singing every day With spiritual blessings In Christ the Lord.
